title: Harare City Marathon 2026

ticketTiers.description: Includes official race timing bib chip, technical running t-shirt, finisher medal, and goodie bag.

ticketTiers.description: Includes official race timing bib chip, technical running t-shirt, finisher medal, and goodie bag.

ticketTiers.description: Includes official race timing bib chip, running t-shirt, and finisher medal.

ticketTiers.name: 5km Fun Run & Walk

title: Victoria Falls Carnival 2026
description: A three-day music and culture festival with headline DJs, regional acts, and adventure activities around Victoria Falls.
location: Victoria Falls Primary School & Elephant Hills Resort

ticketTiers.name: 3-Day General Pass
ticketTiers.description: Access to all main stages and festival grounds for all 3 days.

ticketTiers.name: 3-Day VIP Deck Pass
ticketTiers.description: Fast-track entry, access to elevated VIP viewing deck, private bars, and welcome drink.

ticketTiers.name: 3-Day VVIP Backstage Experience
ticketTiers.description: All VIP perks plus backstage artist lounge access and premium transfers.

customFields.name: accommodation
customFields.label: Where are you staying in Vic Falls?

title: Zimbabwe Tech Summit 2026
description: The largest technology conference in Zimbabwe, bringing together developers, startup founders, marketers, and investors.

ticketTiers.name: Student Pass
ticketTiers.description: Discounted access for active college and university students.

ticketTiers.name: Standard Delegate
ticketTiers.description: Full access to all panels, exhibition hall, lunch and coffee breaks.

ticketTiers.name: VIP Executive Pass
ticketTiers.description: Front-row seating, access to VIP lounge, private catering, and invitation to VIP dinner.

title: Bulawayo Jazz & Heritage Nights 2026
description: An open-air celebration of jazz, spoken word, and heritage performances in the city centre.

ticketTiers.name: Standard Seat
ticketTiers.description: General admission seating with access to the food court.

ticketTiers.name: Front Row Seat
ticketTiers.description: Reserved front row seating with commemorative program booklet.

ticketTiers.name: VIP Table
ticketTiers.description: Reserved table for four with bottle service and backstage meet-and-greet.

title: Lake Chivero Food & Wine Festival 2026
description: A weekend of local chefs, boutique wineries, live acoustic sets, and family activities by the lake.

ticketTiers.name: Day Pass
ticketTiers.description: Festival entry, tasting vouchers, and access to the lakeside market.

ticketTiers.name: Couples Pass
ticketTiers.description: Entry for two with two tasting vouchers and reserved picnic seating.

ticketTiers.name: Chef's Table Experience
ticketTiers.description: Curated tasting menu, wine pairing, and kitchen-side demo access.
